name: HMS Loch Tarbert (K 431)
events: 15 Apr 1945 HMS Universal (Lt. S.S. Brooks, DSC, RN), HMS Votary (Lt. P.M. Staveley, RN) and HMS Seraph (Lt. T. Russell-Walling, RN) departed Tobermory for Loch Alsh. They were escorted by HMS Loch Tarbert (T/A/Lt.Cdr. G. Butcher, DSC, RNVR). (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
